name: Bittersweet Chocolate Creme Brulee W/Caramelized Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine milk and heavy cream over medium heat. Bring to a boil.
3. Add chopped chocolate to the hot cream and milk mixture; stir for 5 minutes.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat egg yolks with granulated sugar until smooth.
5. Gradually pour in the chocolate mixture while continuing to beat.
6. Allow the mixture to cool.
7. Fill 6 ungreased 4-cup ramekins with equal amounts of the creme brulee mixture.
8. Place ramekins in a water bath and poach in the oven for 50-60 minutes, or until set.
9. Transfer ramekins to a baking sheet and let cool slightly.
10. Decorate each ramekin with 5 or 6 slices of bananas.
11. Sprinkle brown sugar over the top of each creme brulee.
12. Broil under low heat until the sugar melts and turns golden.
